title: Tensura Compat: FTB
description: A compatibility brigde between Tensura: Reincarnated and FTB mods (including FTB Library, FTB Chunks, FTB Teams and FTB Quests).
body:
This is a compatibility mod, a bridge between [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fmodrinth.com%252fmod%252ftensura-reincarnated) and FTB Mods. Built for servers since Tensura: Reincarnated will ignore most common land claim plugins.

## You need the FTB mods as well or the game will crash.

### **Features**

*   Skill Griefing disabled in claims.
*   Tensura Abilities won't apply harmful effect, energy drain, possession, spiritual damage in non-pvp claims.
*   Skill plundering (copy/steal) won't be allowed in non-pvp claims.
*   Forced-teleportation and Forced-movement by Tensura Abilities won't be allowed in non-pvp claims.
*   Kills by subordinates or clones will contribute to the owner's FTB quests.
*   Teams created by FTB Teams will be considered ally for Tensura's Ally system.
*   New task types for FTB Quests: Ability Acquisition, Awakening Status, Existence points, Spirits and Races.
